# Creative genome embeddings

## Purpose

Group videos by mechanism, not surface imitation.

## Embedding inputs

```text
transcript
hook text
caption/title
visual tags
story format
CTA
comment themes
metric outcome vector
```

## Mechanism clusters

Possible clusters:

```text
first-frame proof cluster
before-after transformation cluster
mistake diagnosis cluster
saveable checklist cluster
sendable identity cluster
myth-bust controversy cluster
search tutorial cluster
series-follow cluster
```

## Use cases

```text
find patterns among winners
detect overused templates
spot under-tested variants
recommend next experiments
compare niche-specific mechanisms
```

## Anti-copy rule

Do not copy a viral video’s surface.
Extract:

```text
mechanism
viewer problem
metric moved
proof type
action trigger
```

Then rebuild in original form.
